criteria.name: AI-Powered Features
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes AI to enhance social networking functionalities, including content creation, scheduling, analytics, and user experience personalization.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: How user-friendly and intuitive the app is to navigate, including design, ease of use, and overall user satisfaction.

criteria.name: Automation Capabilities
criteria.description: The ability of the app to automate social media management tasks, such as scheduling posts, generating content, and responding to messages.

criteria.name: Content Creation Tools
criteria.description: Availability of AI-driven tools for generating engaging and relevant content, including text, images, and videos.

criteria.name: Analytics and Reporting
criteria.description: The depth and accuracy of analytics provided by the app, including insights into audience behavior, engagement metrics, and performance tracking.
